intro: A fast-paced arena shooter game with simple controls and strategic battles.Experience a story original to the game, starring the characters of Appraiser (Provisional).
description:
Fast-paced Arena Shooter
Dive into a fast-paced arena shooter where the controls are simple but the battles test your strategy!

Explore dungeons filled with summoners who unleash waves of enemies, relentless attackers, 
and the fearsome “Phantom” that hunts you down without mercy.

Level up to boost your stats and grab equipment from treasure chests to strengthen your character. 
With each upgrade offering random sets of three options, your character grows differently every time you play.

Choose three party members before entering the dungeon.
Each combination changes your active and passive skills, dramatically altering your tactics.

Clear all the challenges in each stage and defeat the mighty boss lurking in the depths of the dungeon!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A Game-Exclusive Story
Experience a brand-new, fully voiced adventure that branches off from the early events of The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!.

After parting ways with Emalia, Hibiki takes on jobs to earn money together with Lillian, Claude, and Vene.
The group sets out into a forest to collect materials for a quest—a forest where people have been mysteriously disappearing.
Suddenly, they fall into a magical trap that whisks them away to a strange dungeon…

Will Hibiki and the others be able to escape from the dungeon?
And who is the mysterious girl they encounter within its depths?
